title: Hero: Form summary
code:
<form>
  <gds-flex flex-direction="column" gap="m" align-items="stretch" justify-content="center" width="360px">
    <fieldset style="display: none">
      <legend>Fieldset 1</legend>
    <input
      type="text"
      aria-invalid="true"
      data-label="Field 1 label"
      required=""
      hidden
    />
    </fieldset>
    <gds-form-summary id="summary"></gds-form-summary>
  </gds-flex>
</form>
